title: Amtech - 2-in-1 Craft Knife and Folding Utility Knife, Durable and Rust-Proof Stainless Steel, Comfortable Handle for Reduced Hand Fatigue, Lightweight and Portable (Includes 5 SK5 Blades)
features: DURABLE: This 2-in-1 tradesman's knife has a strong and rustproof stainless steel body
VERSATILE: It has two useful functions: a 75mm utility knife and fold back craft knife
DURABLE DESIGN: Built to withstand regular use in demanding environments
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
description: Product Description Constructed from strong, rust-proof stainless steel, the tradesman knife is wear and tear-resistant for a long-lasting performance, even in tough working conditions, allowing you to work without interruptions. The knife combines a 75mm utility knife and a fold-back craft knife in one tool, allowing you to tackle a wide range of cutting tasks. Whether you’re cutting thick materials, packaging, making precise cuts, or crafting, this knife adapts to your needs seamlessly. The ergonomic design provides a comfortable grip to reduce hand fatigue during extended use, while the fold-back craft knife blade securely retracts when not in use to reduce the risk of accidental cuts. With blades that are quick and easy to swap, the knife is great for tradespeople who need a lightweight, portable tool that fits in a toolbox or pocket.
